source: Codex read-only connector checks, user-provided GitHub repository URL/screenshot, and authenticated git push/ls-remote verification on 2026-06-30

github.note: GitHub app installation was observed in a prior connector check. The user provided the newly created public repository URL https://github.com/jinbizman-boop/salary-hijacking.git and a GitHub Quick setup screenshot for salary-hijacking on 2026-06-30. After GitHub Desktop was installed, authenticated git push succeeded and origin/main matched local HEAD 326f49eb6080b683897b8b315fadb1631673dbc4. Existing repositories, including Retro Games and RETRO-DB, must not be modified or used as release targets.

cloudflare.note: Cloudflare connector account access was observed. The account returned zero Workers and one Pages project named retro-db, which is unrelated and must not be used for Salary Hijacking. No matching Salary Hijacking admin Pages project was observed.

neon.note: Neon organization access was observed. The listed project is Retro Games, and read-only searches for salary and hijacking returned no matching projects. Existing Retro Games database resources must not be used for Salary Hijacking.
